deep_dive.title: Constrained Decoding for Diffusion Language Models via Efficient Inference over Finite Automata
deep_dive.abstract: Constrained decoding is essential for serving LLMs, ensuring that generated outputs follow specific structures such as JSON schema-formatted function calls. Existing systems are designed for autoregressive models and assume left-to-right generation, masking out invalid next tokens at each step. Diffusion language models, however, break this assumption: they sample multiple positions simultaneously from a fully-factorized mean-field distribution at each denoising step. In this paper, we present an exact and tractable algorithm for sampling from the constrained mean-field posterior under any constraint expressible as a finite automaton. Viewing finite automata as graphical models, we obtain tractable representations of the constrained distribution that enable efficient inference. The approach guarantees constraint satisfaction by construction, supports both greedy and sampling-based decoding, and is compatible with parallel and block-wise decoding under arbitrary remasking schedules. Applying depth-reduction techniques from arithmetic circuit theory, we further reduce sampling depth from linear to logarithmic in the sequence length. Empirical evaluations on Dream-7B and LLaDA-8B show substantial accuracy gains across various tasks including function calling (xLAM, BFCL), planning (Sudoku, Countdown), text-to-SQL (Spider), and math reasoning (GSM-Symbolic), with little inference overhead relative to unconstrained decoding. For example, on BFCL-Live, our approach improves Dream-7B's greedy decoding accuracy from 63.9% to 71.5%, and stochastic sampling accuracy from 22.3% to 69.0%, where the unconstrained baseline collapses, with under 5% wall-clock overhead.

deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes an algorithm for structured output generation in diffusion language models using finite automata.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 提出一种利用有限自动机在扩散语言模型中实现结构化输出生成的算法。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 提出一种利用有限自动机在扩散语言模型中实现结构化输出生成的算法。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Papers central to 帮我检索自回归扩散模型的研究进展, especially work that connects or combines: autoregressive diffusion models research progress; AR-Diffusion model architecture and performance; autoregressive sequence generation with diffusion; combining autoregressive models and diffusion models; recent advances in autoregressive diffusion models; state of the art autoregressive diffusion architectures.
